analysis_result: LZTR1 mutation frequency: 4/54 = 7.4% across the 54-sample WES cohort. (Paper reports 7%.)
denominator_used: N = 54 WES samples (WES=='X' in MOESM4, barcodes = 'Tumor_' + WES label).
assumptions_made: Non-synonymous variants defined as {Missense_Mutation, Nonsense_Mutation, Frame_Shift_Del, Frame_Shift_Ins, Splice_Site, In_Frame_Del, In_Frame_Ins, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop_Mutation} (i.e., excluded Silent); PASS filter applied on FILTER column; LZTR1 identified by Hugo_Symbol=='LZTR1'; sample inclusion restricted to 54 WES barcodes (3 MAF samples Tumor_1869, Tumor_M2242, Tumor_RT3379 are excluded because they are not in the 54-sample WES cohort per MOESM4).
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
   - MOESM4 (Tumor inventory): 108 rows, 15 columns. Used 'WES' and 'WES label' to derive the 54-sample WES cohort.
   - MOESM5 (Supplementary Table 2 MAF): 7457 rows, 123 columns. Used Tumor_Sample_Barcode, Hugo_Symbol, Variant_Classification, FILTER.

B. COHORT DEFINITION
   - Filter: WES == 'X' in MOESM4 -> 54 WES samples. Barcodes constructed as 'Tumor_' + WES label.

C. VARIABLE CODING
   - Hugo_Symbol == 'LZTR1'.
   - Non-synonymous: Missense, Nonsense, Frame_Shift_Del/Ins, Splice_Site, In_Frame_Del/Ins, Translation_Start_Site, Nonstop (Silent excluded).
   - FILTER == 'PASS' (all rows in MAF are PASS in this file).
   - Tumor_Sample_Barcode in the 54 WES barcodes.

D. COMPUTATION
   - Rows matching filters: 4 LZTR1 non-syn PASS calls across the WES cohort.
   - Distinct LZTR1-mutated samples: 4.
   - Denominator: 54 WES samples.

E. RESULT
   - LZTR1 mutation frequency = 4/54 = 7.4%. Paper reports 7%.

F. CAVEATS
   - 3 MAF samples (Tumor_1869, Tumor_M2242, Tumor_RT3379) appear in MAF but not in the 54-WES cohort table; excluded.
   - 5 WES-cohort samples have no mutations in MAF (Tumor_2138, Tumor_2178, Tumor_2414, Tumor_882, Tumor_M3398), contributing 0 to any gene numerator.
   - All rows in this MAF already carry FILTER='PASS' and TGL_FILTER_VERDICT='PASS'; the PASS filter has no additional effect here.
   - Non-synonymous definition follows common convention used for oncoprint displays.
